item.title: Guia de Sintaxe Markdown
item.description: Esse artigo é um exemplo básico para mostrar a sintaxe Markdown que é usada nos arquivos de conteúdo do Hugo. Ele também mostrar como cada elemento básico HTML é estilizado com CSS com os temas do Hugo.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Conteúdo Rico
item.description:
O Hugo vem com vários Shortcodes Internos para conteúdo rico, assim como uma Configuração de Privacidade e uma gama de Shortcodes simples que permitem embutir versões estáticas e sem JS de várias de redes sociais.

Link to heading

item.title: Rich Content
item.description:
Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

Link to heading

item.title: Mais Conteúdo Rico
item.description:
O Hugo Coder proporciona alguns Shortcodes Customizados.

Link to heading

item.title: More Rich Content
item.description:
Hugo Coder provides some Custom Shortcodes.

Link to heading

item.title: Configuração de Equações Matemáticas
item.description: Em um projeto Hugo as Notações Matemáticas podem ser usadas com a ajuda de bibliotecas JavaScript de terceiros.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: HTML and CSS only tabs
item.description: Shortcodes Link to heading The following content: {{< tabgroup >}} {{< tab name="Hello" >}} Hello World! {{< /tab >}} {{< tab name="Goodbye" >}} Goodbye Everybody! {{< /tab >}} {{< /tabgroup >}} Will generate: .tabs input#tab-0-0:checked ~ .tab-content-0-0 { display: block; } Hello Hello World! .tabs input#tab-0-1:checked ~ .tab-content-0-1 { display: block; } Goodbye Goodbye Everybody! Right alighment Link to heading You can also align the tabs to the right:

item.title: HTML and CSS only tabs
item.description: Shortcodes Link to heading O seguinte conteúdo: {{< tabgroup >}} {{< tab name="Hello" >}} Hello World! {{< /tab >}} {{< tab name="Goodbye" >}} Goodbye Everybody! {{< /tab >}} {{< /tabgroup >}} Irá gerar: .tabs input#tab-0-0:checked ~ .tab-content-0-0 { display: block; } Hello Hello World! .tabs input#tab-0-1:checked ~ .tab-content-0-1 { display: block; } Goodbye Goodbye Everybody! Alinhamento à direita Link to heading Você também pode alinhas as tabs à direita:

item.title: Mermaid JS support
item.description: If you want to use Mermaid-JS on your website. Provide mermaid as Shortcode in your markdown file. flowchart LR A -- B B -- C C -- D D -- B sequenceDiagram participant Alice participant Bob Alice-Bob: Hi Bob Bob-Alice: Hi Alice Find more example on Mermaid-JS website.

item.title: Mermaid JS support
item.description: Se quiser usar o Mermaid-JS em sua página. Use o shortcode mermaid em seus conteúdos Markdown. flowchart LR A -- B B -- C C -- D D -- B sequenceDiagram participant Alice participant Bob Alice-Bob: Hi Bob Bob-Alice: Hi Alice Entro mais exemplos na página do Mermaid-JS.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: Suporte a Emojis
item.description: Emojis podem ser ativados em um projeto Hugo de diversar formas.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Texto de Exemplo
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: About
item.description: I am a first-year PhD student at the University of Tokyo. Links: GitHub ORCiD
Codes Link to heading in preperation Datasets Link to heading in preperation

Scholarships and Grants Link to heading Research Fellowship for Young Scientists (DC1), Japan Society for the Promotion of Science, Apr. 2024 - Mar. 2027. World-Leading Innovative Graduate Study Program for Materials Research, Information, and Technology (MERIT-WINGS), The University of Tokyo, Oct. 2022 - Mar. 2027. Awards Link to heading 東京大学工学系研究科マテリアル工学専攻 優秀修士論文賞，2024年3月． Best Contributed Speaker Award, 2022 MRS Fall meeting & exhibit, Dec.

Papers Link to heading Izumi Takahara, Kiyou Shibata, Teruyasu Mizoguchi, Submitted. Izumi Takahara, Kiyou Shibata, Teruyasu Mizoguchi, “Towards the atomic-level analysis of ground-state electronic structures of solid materials via prediction from core-loss spectra”, ChemRxiv Izumi Takahara, Kiyou Shibata, Teruyasu Mizoguchi, “Crystal orbital overlap population based on all-electron ab initio simulation with numeric atom-centered orbitals and its application to chemical-bonding analysis in Li-intercalated layered materials”, Modelling and Simulation in Materials Science and Engineering, in press, arXiv.
